title: Offices to Go® Newland™ L-Shaped Suite NLP420
brand_hint: OTG / Offices to Go (look for MVL or OTG model code)

specs.manufacturer: OTG / Offices to Go (a division of Global Furniture Group)
specs.materials: Thermally fused laminate (1" thick) with 2 mm matching edge banding
key_features: L-shaped management suite (configurable left- or right-hand)
Includes rectangular desk (NL7230D), return (NL4224R), open hutch (NL71HO), 2x laminate doors (NL35DRL), box/box/file pedestal (NL23BBF)
Designed for quick assembly with leveling glides
Modular components compatible across Newland line
